creator: freebsd@justmail.de
text:
(In reply to Sjack from comment #2)
My build-hardware is an Intel Xeon X5675 with 6Cores(12 Threads), 16GByte RAM and 9GByte Swap. It's a dedicated build server with nothing but poudriere running. But even this seems not to be enough since FreeBSD killed poudriere because of OOM (according to dmesg). BTW, I'm allowing parallel build via ALLOW_MAKE_JOBS=YES in poudriere.conf.
